description_long: This is a small gas station set in a desert-like environment, featuring a rectangular fueling canopy with a green trim and two main structures: a convenience store and a service building. The station is surrounded by sandy terrain with scattered rocks and desert vegetation, and a paved road runs alongside the property. The fueling area is covered by a flat canopy supported by columns, with visible fuel pumps beneath. The convenience store is a boxy building with a flat roof, located adjacent to the fueling area, and there are marked parking spaces in front. Several red barrels and utility items are scattered around the site, adding to the utilitarian feel. The overall color palette is dominated by sandy browns, muted greens, and grays, evoking a remote roadside stop.
description: A compact desert gas station with a green-trimmed canopy, two main buildings, fuel pumps, and scattered barrels, set beside a paved road and rocky terrain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main canopy, convenience store, and service building, with the road in the foreground and rocky hills to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the parking spaces, fuel pumps under the canopy, and the convenience store to the right, with rocks behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the buildings, the canopy, and the rocky terrain on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the canopy, service building, and a small blue dumpster near the road, with rocks in the foreground.
attribute_fuel_pumps: There are two visible fuel pumps under the canopy, each rectangular and modern in style, colored mainly gray with green accents. Hoses and nozzles are visible, but there is no clear branding or digital display detail.
attribute_canopy_structure: A large, flat rectangular canopy with green trim covers the fueling area, supported by four white columns. The canopy appears to be made of metal and concrete, with no visible lighting or signage attached.
attribute_convenience_store_entrance: The convenience store entrance is located at the front of the main building, facing the fueling area. It features a single manual door, likely glass, with no visible signage or branding above the entrance.
